About California Recovery Center

California Recovery Center (CRC) is a licensed alcohol and drug treatment provider located in Roseville, Northern California, that has reimagined the traditional approach to addiction recovery. The center offers boutique, residential addiction treatment with luxury amenities, focusing on personalized, individualized treatment plans that combine evidence-based therapies with holistic and modern therapeutic approaches. CRC operates under the philosophy that addiction is an individual disease with shared experiences, requiring unique paths to recovery for each client. The center emphasizes removing stigma around addiction treatment while providing comprehensive care including detoxification, residential inpatient programs, and outpatient services in a judgment-free environment.

We work directly with businesses and individuals to understand their specific needs and build solutions that fit.

Our team brings hands-on experience and a practical approach to every project we take on.
